<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Stream VRM load events"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/stream"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns an SSE stream that emits an event each time a VRM model is loaded.

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
